creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri Nov 15 20:52:32 2013
New Revision: 333924
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333924

Log:
  - Update to 1.4.1
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, support STAGEDIR
  
  Changes:	https://code.google.com/p/pyang/source/browse/trunk/CHANGES
  PR:		ports/183998
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/Makefile
  head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/distinfo
  head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/pkg-plist

Modified: head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 20:52:26 2013	(r333923)
+++ head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/Makefile	Fri Nov 15 20:52:32 2013	(r333924)
@@ -2,24 +2,21 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	pyang
-PORTVERSION=	1.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	net-mgmt python
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Validator and code generator for YANG (RFC 4741)
 
 LICENSE=	BSD
 
-USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
 
 DATADIR=	${PREFIX}/share/yang
 
-MAN1=		pyang.1 yang2dsdl.1
-
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
 		's|share/man|man|' ${WRKSRC}/setup.py

Modified: head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/distinfo	Fri Nov 15 20:52:26 2013	(r333923)
+++ head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/distinfo	Fri Nov 15 20:52:32 2013	(r333924)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (pyang-1.3.tar.gz) = 361c6a943feb47776d28fc6e5809c52e1ebaf9067c4fa7a853c120875c76ac39
-SIZE (pyang-1.3.tar.gz) = 188048
+SHA256 (pyang-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 5373c690038b49b1ad7d2f10310f44cbcd8f4803ec20c36f19f67ada16f9ec6d
+SIZE (pyang-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 199439

Modified: head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 20:52:26 2013	(r333923)
+++ head/net-mgmt/py-pyang/pkg-plist	Fri Nov 15 20:52:32 2013	(r333924)
@@ -88,6 +88,8 @@ bin/yang2html
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyang/yin_parser.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyang/yin_parser.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/pyang/yin_parser.pyo
+man/man1/pyang.1.gz
+man/man1/yang2dsdl.1.gz
 %%DATADIR%%/images/case.png
 %%DATADIR%%/images/choice.png
 %%DATADIR%%/images/container.png
@@ -104,7 +106,9 @@ bin/yang2html
 %%DATADIR%%/images/module.png
 %%DATADIR%%/images/notification.png
 %%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-inet-types.yang
+%%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-netconf.yang
 %%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-netconf-monitoring.yang
+%%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-netconf-with-defaults.yang
 %%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-yang-smiv2.yang
 %%DATADIR%%/modules/ietf-yang-types.yang
 %%DATADIR%%/schema/relaxng-lib.rng
